name: Benchmark dashboard shows all three dataset scores
description: When a user opens the Benchmark page, the dashboard displays three dataset results (Dataset A: Honest Code, Dataset B: Cheating AI, Dataset C: Smart Evasion) each with a numeric Trust Score.

planSteps.description: The benchmark page shows at least three dataset result cards or rows, each containing a numeric Trust Score between 0 and 100
Dataset A (honest code) shows a high score (80 or above), while at least one other dataset shows a lower score reflecting cheating detection
